subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-06 to a minister of Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Do not write to the emperor; he is proud and preoccupied, and will not take heed at present
subcodes.first_line_orig: امّا بامپراطور آلمان منویس زیرا مغرورند و مشغول حالا گوش نمیدهند
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @wisdom [hikmat], @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
